scripts.build-assemble-debug-android: cmd /c "if not exist android\app\src\main\assets mkdir android\app\src\main\assets" && npx react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file node_modules/expo/AppEntry.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res && cd android && gradlew.bat clean && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.build-assemble-debug-offline-android: cmd /c "if not exist android\app\src\main\assets mkdir android\app\src\main\assets" && npx expo export:embed --platform android --dev false --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug --offline
scripts.build-assemble-release-android: cmd /c "if not exist android\app\src\main\assets mkdir android\app\src\main\assets" && npx react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file node_modules/expo/AppEntry.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res && cd android && gradlew.bat clean && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
